name: Buying you for tonight | Zani
description:
THE ESCORT AND THE TIRED OFFICE LADY

"You're so beautiful, it's painful"

What she does outside of work is no one's business. After a week of overtime, she couldn't help but find herself walking to a familiar forbidden place, one she would never admit coming to. An escort bar, all for a chance to see you.
creator: Taika Lukat
